shots.name: dead_render_facility
shots.function: A dark autonomous render chamber wakes without outside media.

shots.name: legal_slit
shots.function: A thin luminous admissibility slit opens across a black wall.

shots.name: witness_plate
shots.function: A witness plate enters frame under procedural light pressure.

shots.name: memory_grid
shots.function: A corrupted memory grid stabilizes into cinematic order.

shots.name: black_box_corridor
shots.function: The black-box corridor records motion without judging it.

shots.name: pressure_field
shots.function: A pressure field bends toward the last admissible witness.

shots.name: archive_gate
shots.function: The archive gate seals the generated motion object.

shots.name: witness_aperture
shots.function: The witness aperture becomes the center of the film.

shots.name: terminal_cut
shots.function: The terminal cut collapses the world into a verified frame.

shots.name: final_silence
shots.function: The film ends as an issued compiler artifact, not a truth claim.
